purpose.zh: 技术分享、AI 工具介绍、开发者培训。
purpose.en: Technical talks, AI tool explainers, and developer training.

style.zh: 深色科技主题，暖金与蓝色强调，适合工程和安全语境。
style.en: Dark technical theme with warm gold and blue accents for engineering and safety contexts.

templateStrength: Reusable style distilled from a finished PowerPoint deck.
